events.title: Angular Keynote
events.description: The future of the framework revealed. Join the Angular team as they unveil the latest advancements in reactivity, hydration, and tooling.

events.title: Signals Deep Dive
events.description: Mastering the primitive that changed everything. Learn how to architect complex state without the chaos of manual subscriptions.

events.title: Server-Side Rendering at Scale
events.description: Hydration, Defer, and Performance. How to deliver instant TTI using Angular's new Incremental Hydration engine.
